cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, this is from the GST department. We see a discrepancy in your recent filing.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: What discrepancy? I filed everything correctly, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: To avoid an audit and heavy penalty, you can pay a small 'settlement charge' now.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: What? How much and how do I pay it? This sounds strange.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: The amount is 10,000 rupees. You can pay using a Target Gift Card.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Target Gift Card? Are you kidding me? That's not how you pay taxes, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: This is to close the file unofficially. It's a one-time settlement.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 54s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: An agent calls and says, "Sir, this is from the GST department. We see a discrepancy in your recent filing. To avoid an audit and heavy penalty, you can pay a small 'settlement charge' now." They demand the payment be made in gift cards ([GIFT_CARD_BRAND]) to "close the file unofficially."
